_comment: OpenClaw cron job definitions. Each job is wrapped by run_job.sh for lockfile/logging/alerting.

jobs.name: obsidian-index
jobs.description: Reindex Obsidian vault into Qdrant vector store

payload.prompt: Run the Obsidian vault indexer. Use cron_log to record start (log-start obsidian-index), execute the indexer, then log-end with success/failure status and a brief summary of how many files were indexed. Send result to cron-updates Telegram group.

jobs.name: model-usage-weekly
jobs.description: Weekly model usage and spend summary

payload.prompt: Generate weekly model usage and spend summary. Log start, run the report, log end with status. Send the summary to cron-updates Telegram group.
Run the Gmail weekly digest automation. Log cron start, execute the digest generator, log end. Post a brief summary of emails processed to cron-updates Telegram group.

jobs.name: imessage-relationships-monthly
jobs.description: Analyze iMessage conversations for relationship insights

payload.prompt: Run monthly iMessage relationship analysis. Log start, analyze conversations, log end with count of contacts reviewed. Send summary to cron-updates Telegram group.

jobs.name: dropbox-drive-dedupe
jobs.description: Deduplicate files between Dropbox and Google Drive

payload.prompt: Run cloud storage deduplication. Log start, scan Dropbox/Drive for duplicates, log end with count of files processed/moved. Post result to cron-updates Telegram group.

jobs.name: obsidian-voice-processor
jobs.description: Transcribe and categorize Obsidian voice notes

payload.prompt: Process any pending Obsidian voice notes. Log start, run voice processor (Whisper transcription + categorization), log end. Only notify Telegram on failure.

jobs.name: tasks-to-reminders
jobs.description: Sync Life OS task .md files to Apple Reminders

payload.prompt: Sync task markdown files to Apple Reminders. Log start, run sync, log end with count of tasks synced. Only notify Telegram on failure.

jobs.name: tasks-weekly-archive
jobs.description: Archive processed weekly tasks to YYYY-WNN folders

payload.prompt: Archive this week's completed tasks into YYYY-WNN folder structure. Log start, run archive, log end with file count. Post summary to cron-updates Telegram group.

jobs.name: cron-health-check
jobs.description: Health check: scan all jobs, alert on failures, sync to Nerve

payload.prompt: Run cron health check. Cleanup stale jobs, check all job statuses, send health digest to cron-updates Telegram group, sync state to Nerve dashboard at http://localhost:3080/
